---
title: "Example Workflow"
author: Alec L. Robitaille, Isabella C. Richmond
format: revealjs
---

## Why workflows?

-   Reduced mental load
    -   no need to keep track of what has been changed
    -   can easily branch off of earlier work
-   Iterative
-   Reliable
-   Easy to share

## Why {targets}?

-   Most relevant package for R users

-   Extremely powerful, part of a universe ('targetopia')

-   Well documented, actively developed

## What does it look like?

```{r}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

setwd('example-targets-workflow')

library(targets)

tar_visnetwork(targets_only = T)


```
